remarks: Welcome to 114 Belltown Road, Stamford! If you've been searching for an affordable home in a desirable Stamford location and aren't afraid to add your own personal touches, this is the opportunity you've been waiting for. This 3-bedroom, 1-bath Cape-style home offers solid bones, a functional layout, and major upside potential for first-time homebuyers, investors, or anyone looking to build equity.  Situated on a level lot with a spacious backyard, the property features a detached garage, ample off-street parking, and a location that provides convenient access to shopping, restaurants, parks, schools, Merritt Parkway, I-95, and Metro-North for an easy New York City commute.  Inside, you'll find a home that is ready for cosmetic updates and modernization while benefiting from a strong structure and mechanical systems. Whether you're looking to renovate over time or create your dream home from day one, this property offers the flexibility and value today's buyers are seeking.  Opportunities like this in Stamford are becoming increasingly rare. Bring your vision, roll up your sleeves, and unlock the full potential of this well-located home in one of Stamford's most convenient neighborhoods. Being sold as-is.
